name: Simon Unge
involvement_summary: Simon Unge was KuchenTV's former friend and roommate who became involved in a public controversy. In December 2021, Unge posted a video accusing KuchenTV of domestic violence and controlling behavior. KuchenTV responded with his own apology video that was widely criticized. The incident led to significant backlash against KuchenTV and highlighted personal relationships that became public controversies.
